privileged_info_summary: The task is 'compile_investigation_report' which requires finding and reporting on ArkCase complaint cases related to 'Operation Nightshade'. The task creates synthetic data with 3 target cases containing 'Operation Nightshade' in their titles (with priorities High, Medium, and Low respectively) and 3 distractor cases for other projects. The agent must extract Case Number, Complaint Title, and Priority for each target case and write them to /home/ga/Documents/nightshade_report.json as a JSON array. The ground truth containing target cases is stored at /root/validation/ground_truth.json.
